# Traffic Source Report

Owner: `organic-traffic-strategist`

```yaml
traffic_source_report:
  id: tsr-YYYYMMDD-slug
  product_bet_revision_ref:
  surface_version_ref:
  owner: organic-traffic-strategist
  created_at:
```

## Summary

```yaml
summary:
  total_unique_visitors:
  total_sessions:
  total_CTA_clicks:
  total_waitlist_submits:
  channel_count:
  best_channel:
  worst_channel:
  source_quality_summary:
```

## Sources

```yaml
sources:
  - channel:
    source_ref:
    unique_visitors:
    CTA_click_rate:
    waitlist_conversion:
    qualitative_feedback:
    ICP_fit: low | medium | high | unknown
    notes:
```

## Interpretation

```yaml
interpretation:
  enough_traffic: yes | no
  enough_channel_diversity: yes | no
  traffic_problem_or_offer_problem:
  recommended_next_action: run_more_traffic | revise_channel | revise_offer | revise_landing | review_evidence
  sufficiency_status: pass | retry | escalate
```
